prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
You’ve got this.  
That task hasn’t disappeared just because you’ve been avoiding it—and neither has your strength.  
One small step right now is louder than a day of hesitation.  
You don’t have to be perfect, you just have to start.  
Your future self is already thanking you for showing up.  
Now go crush it—because you’re capable, you’re ready, and you've got the fire to follow through.  
Go. 🔥💪
